overview.heading: OVERVIEW
overview.content: This agreement covers the full build and delivery of one Alumni GTM Intelligence system. Client provides customer list (up to 500 accounts) and target job titles. Payment of $10,000 is due upon signature. Dashboard and data are hosted on provider infrastructure for up to one year. 30 days of priority support included post-delivery.

deliverable.heading: GTM Intelligence Dashboard
deliverable.description: A pipeline of people who already know your product—used it at a previous company—and are now in decision-making roles at companies that fit your ICP. Full contact and company intelligence on every qualified match.

items.title: Contact data
items.description: Work email, mobile phone, and LinkedIn for every match.

items.title: Current role details
items.description: Title, company, start date, and time in seat.

items.title: Employment history
items.description: Previous role at your customer, tenure, and departure timing.

items.title: Company intelligence
items.description: Headcount, headcount growth, industry, HQ location, funding stage, total raised, and tech stack.

items.title: Ecommerce signals
items.description: Shopify and Shopify Plus identification where applicable.

items.title: Meta Ads intelligence
items.description: Active campaigns, estimated monthly spend, creative samples, landing page URLs, and days running.

items.title: Google Ads intelligence
items.description: Active campaigns, estimated spend, top keywords, and ad copy.

items.title: GTM briefing
items.description: Per-lead memo summarizing who they are, what their company does, why they're a fit, and angles for outreach.

items.title: Full data export
items.description: CSV export of all leads and enrichment data.

signature.instruction: Sign below and complete payment to begin.
